violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Certificate found expired for listed food service manager. This person is also no longer associated with the facility. Facility should have a manager certified in food safety as soon as possible.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Ice cream cones found near the ice cream machine were found without protection from consumers. Cones should be provided with a lid on the container or sneeze guard to protect them from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The blade for the commercial manual can opener was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Refrigerated prep tables, reach-in hot and cold pass through cabinets, inside of microwave, walk-in cooler shelves and the outside of the pizza ovens were found dirty during inspection. These area should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles and vents in the dish room were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
